locked_scope.output_intent: Check whether an official clearance or reoccupancy answer exists after damage, tag, closure, or restriction.

jurisdiction.likely_obo_or_ocbo: Davao City Office of the City Building Official

identity_caveats: Fixture packet for validator coverage; not a live target claim.

lane_results.question: If the building was yellow-tagged, red-tagged, damaged, closed, or restricted, has it later been officially cleared?
document_targets_searched: accepted repair completion with use language

best_sources.title: Fixture OCBO reoccupancy clearance
best_sources.publisher: Fixture Office of the City Building Official
best_sources.supports: Fixture target-specific clearance allowing reoccupancy for the stated scope and date after required work was accepted.
best_sources.does_not_support: Does not certify conditions outside the stated scope, date, and official language.

lane_results.answer_text: Official clearance evidence was found for reoccupancy for the stated scope and date.

integrated_answer.summary: Official clearance evidence was found for the stated post-tag scope and date.
integrated_answer.citizen_safe_summary: Official clearance evidence was found for reoccupancy for the stated scope and date. Do not generalize it beyond the document's scope.

forbidden_claims: fit for occupancy beyond the document scope
overclaim_boundary.allowed_claim: Official clearance evidence was found for the stated scope and date.
